stemHtml: What collision avoidance capability does your TCAS II device offer when monitoring 3 aircraft in close proximity?

options.a: It is capable of providing you with information on the 3 aircraft, but only an RA for one aircraft at a time.
options.b: It is capable of providing you with vertical maneuvres for the 3 aircraft at the same time.
options.c: It is capable of detecting potential conflicts with the 3 aircraft and providing advisory alerts.
options.d: It is capable of suggesting resolutions to avoid potential collisions with the 3 aircraft.
